title: gahnia gahniiformis
intro: Gahnia gahniiformis, also known as the broad-leaved saw-sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in wetlands and along watercourses in Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The broad-leaved saw-sedge has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems, and has been traditionally used as a natural remedy for its health benefits. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
